package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// scenario for viper_get_in_hot_path: `viper.GetString("key")` or `viper.GetInt("key")` inside handler functions or loops
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario431Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	_ = os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	return http.Get(url)
}
